description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.

An Exotic Asault Rifle that uses only Autofire. Holds 40 bullets, using 20 bullets with each attack. Uses Autofire rules with a multiplication of up to a maximum of 5. Additionally, firing the weapon also counts as a suppressive fire check. Requires BODY 11 or higher (unless mounted). Refer to the full item description on pg. 349.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.

information.notes:
Equipped with the A/V-4 Main Gun, fastened to the bottom of the vehicle. Cockpit holds up to two pilots, and the cargo area holds up to six other individuals (individuals with BODY of 10 or more take up 2 spots). Doors can be opened fully, allowing for two deployments at a time, or partially, allowing for partial cover of two individuals. The AV only opens to one side.

The Helix is mounted next to the door and its wielder is always in partial cover, but takes no penalty while firing. The Helix can be fired with the user's Heavy Weapons skill, instead of the vehicle's autofire skill (use Martial for mooks). The A/V-4 Main Gun can be fired using a TECH-based roll of the appropriate skill by a user in the cockpit, instead of the vehicle's martial skill.

Ability - Smoke Canisters: As an action, the pilot of this vehicle may deploy a smoke grenade directly beneath its current location.

Ah, the work horse of the 2030s. You know I used to have one of these? Complete with door mount. Lost it when the gonk nomad running a job for me crashed it into an AeroZep halfway between here and Seattle. Good thing he died in the crash, or I would have had someone him alive.
